meaning: n.钉头,权杖,肉豆蔻,肉豆蔻树,豆蔻香料,催泪瓦斯,肉豆蔻皮
examples: The shaft of the ceremonial mace is the whorled tusk of a narwhal, a small Arctic whale. The door handles are of walrus tusk.
Bushes of last year reed mace alongshore the Straditsa river.
In 2000 no aphids had a particular resistance mechanism called mace.
Stephan Mace -- got out of the Humvee as part of an escape plan they hatched.
London-based Mace will team up with British firm EC Harris to create the Kingdom Tower in Jeddah.
